skills.name: Oben Electric
skills.glossary: Led cross-functional engineering teams across Backend, Frontend, Data Analytics, Firmware, and DevOps while architecting scalable EV platforms, IoT infrastructure, and telemetry analytics.
skills.description: Fast-growing electric motorcycle company focused on sustainable mobility. Led 7+ engineering projects, built scalable microservices, secured IoT communication for EVs, optimized analytics over terabytes of vehicle telemetry data, and managed critical systems handling payments and sensitive operational data.

skills.name: Visit Health Pvt Ltd
skills.glossary: Owned and scaled the diagnostics platform by integrating leading healthcare partners, implementing Kafka-based synchronization, Airflow automation, and analytics systems.
skills.description: Digital healthcare platform offering OPD, diagnostics, consultations, insurance, and wellness services. Led the diagnostics module, integrated major laboratory providers, automated operational workflows, improved database performance, built reporting tools, and contributed to a 500% business expansion over three years.

skills.name: Kabra Logitech
skills.glossary: Developed logistics ERP features including route optimization, vehicle tracking, delivery workflows, and AWS auto-scaling deployment.
skills.description: Transportation and fleet management company providing ERP solutions for logistics operations. Developed fleet tracking, load planning, reporting, employee attendance, door-to-door delivery features, and implemented AWS Elastic Beanstalk auto-scaling for production workloads.

skills.name: PixelMind IT Solutions
skills.glossary: Built backend systems for CRM and SaaS products including school management and queue management solutions for international clients.
skills.description: Software development company delivering CRM and enterprise applications for global clients. Developed core backend modules for Skoolgo school management platform and QMS queue management system, including transportation tracking, timetable management, PTA records, and performance optimizations.

skills.name: Node.js / Bun.js
skills.glossary: Tech Lead with 6+ years of experience building high-performance backend systems using Node.js and Bun.js. Architected scalable microservices for EV, Healthcare, and Logistics platforms, with strong expertise in asynchronous programming, Event Loop internals, stream processing, worker threads, clustering, and performance optimization for latency-sensitive production workloads.
skills.description: Expert in designing scalable backend services using Node.js and Bun.js, with deep understanding of the Event Loop, execution context, call stack, microtask and macrotask queues, streams, clustering, worker threads, memory management, profiling, and non-blocking I/O to build highly efficient production systems.

skills.name: JavaScript
skills.glossary: Full-time scripting and advanced ES6+ features across all professional roles since 2019, including async concurrency and memory profile optimizations.
skills.description: Advanced ES6+ JavaScript, asynchronous programming (Promises/async-await), closures, scoping, prototypes, and memory management for performant server-side applications.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.glossary: Utilized as primary backend language at Oben Electric, and Kabra Logitech to write strictly typed, modular, and maintainable services.
skills.description: Strictly typed superset of JS. Strong knowledge of custom types, generics, interfaces, and decorators for scalable, enterprise-grade codebases.

skills.name: Payment Integrations
skills.glossary: Designed transaction and refund workflows integrating Razorpay, CashFree, PayPal, and Pine Labs at Visit Health and Oben Electric.
skills.description: Integrating payment processors like PayPal, Pine Labs, CashFree and Razorpay, handling complex webhook flows, subscription lifecycles, and transaction security.

skills.name: WebSockets
skills.glossary: Built real-time Queue Management Systems (QMS) and live vehicle tracking dashboards using native WebSockets and socket connection pooling.
skills.description: Implementing real-time bi-directional communication, socket connection management, heartbeat mechanisms, and scalability.

skills.name: GraphQL
skills.glossary: Designed unified GraphQL gateway schemas to fetch patient diagnostics and booking histories from diverse diagnostic providers.
skills.description: Designing schemas, writing resolvers, optimizing query execution, and integrating Apollo Client/Server for flexible data fetching.

skills.name: Python
skills.glossary: Used Python for data engineering scripting, ETL pipelines using Apache Airflow, and running local AI model evaluation tasks.
skills.description: Used Python for automation scripts, ETL utilities, data processing workflows, and AI experimentation.

skills.name: Go
skills.glossary: Contributed to Liftbridge open-source project and explored Go for performance-oriented backend utilities and systems programming.
skills.description: Statically typed compiled language used for writing lightweight microservices and low-overhead CLI tools.

skills.name: MySQL
skills.glossary: Designed and optimized relational databases for healthcare, EV, and logistics platforms, focusing on high-performance queries, transactional integrity, and scalable data models supporting mission-critical production systems.
skills.description: Experienced in schema design, normalization, indexing strategies, query optimization, execution plan analysis, joins, stored procedures, transactions, locking, isolation levels, replication fundamentals, partitioning, and performance tuning for high-throughput OLTP workloads.

skills.name: Redis
skills.glossary: Leveraged Redis extensively across production systems for low-latency caching, BullMQ job queues, distributed locking, session management, rate limiting, and real-time data access, significantly reducing database load and improving application responsiveness.
skills.description: Hands-on experience with Redis as a cache, message broker, and in-memory datastore. Implemented cache invalidation strategies, Pub/Sub messaging, distributed locks, TTL-based caching, atomic operations, queues with BullMQ, and performance optimization for high-concurrency backend services.

skills.name: PostgreSQL
skills.glossary: Worked with PostgreSQL for relational data modeling, query optimization, indexing, and transactional workloads.
skills.description: Relational database design, writing complex SQL queries, index optimization, execution plan analysis, and connection pooling.

skills.name: MongoDB
skills.glossary: Primary NoSQL DB across Kabra (TapTap ERP), PixelMind and Oben Electric. Developed aggregation pipelines for driver and diagnostic booking reports.
skills.description: NoSQL document storage, schema design for high growth, aggregation pipelines, replica sets, and indexing strategies.

skills.name: ClickHouse
skills.glossary: Used at Oben Electric for analytical reporting and processing of large-scale, historical vehicle telemetry datasets.
skills.description: Fast, column-oriented database management system for online analytical processing (OLAP) on massive telemetry datasets.

skills.name: QuestDB
skills.glossary: Utilized at Oben Electric for high-throughput time-series ingestion and real-time SQL analysis of connected electric motorcycle telemetry.
skills.description: Fast time-series database designed for high-throughput ingestion and real-time SQL analytics on vehicle telemetry and IoT sensor data.

skills.name: DuckDB
skills.glossary: Used for analytical experimentation, local OLAP queries, and processing structured datasets.
skills.description: Embedded analytical database engine designed for fast local analytical queries and serverless data processing.

skills.name: Apache Parquet
skills.glossary: Used Parquet format for efficient storage and analytical processing of large-scale telemetry and structured datasets, enabling optimized data access patterns for reporting and analytics workflows.
skills.description: Columnar storage format optimized for analytical workloads. Experience with schema-based data storage, compression, efficient column pruning, and integration with data processing systems for handling large datasets and OLAP use cases.

skills.name: Qdrant
skills.glossary: Used Qdrant as a vector database for storing and retrieving embeddings in RAG pipelines, enabling semantic search, context retrieval, and knowledge-grounded responses for AI applications.
skills.description: Vector similarity search engine optimized for AI applications. Experience with collection management, vector indexing, similarity queries, metadata filtering, embedding storage, and integrating Qdrant into retrieval-augmented generation workflows.

skills.name: Ollama & vLLM
skills.glossary: Deployed and integrated local LLM runtimes using Ollama and vLLM for private, low-latency AI applications, experimentation, and internal agent workflows requiring controlled inference environments.
skills.description: Experience running and optimizing open-source language models locally, configuring inference servers, managing model serving workflows, improving response latency, and integrating generated outputs with backend applications.

skills.name: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
skills.glossary: Designed RAG-based AI workflows using AWS Bedrock, embeddings, vector databases, and retrieval pipelines to provide context-aware responses grounded on internal knowledge sources.
skills.description: Building RAG architectures involving document ingestion, chunking strategies, embedding generation, vector similarity search, retrieval optimization, prompt augmentation, and LLM response generation using managed and self-hosted models.

skills.name: AWS Bedrock
skills.glossary: Integrated AWS Bedrock foundation models into backend systems to build scalable AI-powered applications with secure access to enterprise knowledge and controlled model interactions.
skills.description: Working with Bedrock models, inference APIs, prompt engineering, knowledge retrieval workflows, model selection, and integrating foundation models into production backend services.

skills.name: Embeddings & Vector Databases
skills.glossary: Implemented semantic search and knowledge retrieval pipelines using embeddings and vector storage systems to improve contextual understanding in AI applications.
skills.description: Experience with embedding generation, similarity search, vector indexing, retrieval optimization, metadata filtering, and integrating vector databases into RAG-based systems.

skills.name: Graph based AI memory
skills.glossary: Explored and integrated open-source graph memory approaches to maintain contextual relationships, improve agent reasoning, and enable persistent knowledge across AI interactions.
skills.description: Understanding of graph-based memory architectures, entity relationships, knowledge graphs, persistent context management, and combining graph retrieval with LLM-powered agent workflows.

skills.name: Kafka
skills.glossary: Designed and managed self-hosted Kafka infrastructure on cloud environments for reliable event-driven communication, supporting real-time EV telemetry ingestion, data synchronization, and asynchronous processing workflows across distributed services.
skills.description: Hands-on experience deploying and operating Kafka clusters, configuring brokers, topics, partitions, replication, consumer groups, retention policies, and monitoring. Built scalable streaming pipelines for telemetry processing, service-to-service communication, and high-volume data movement while ensuring fault tolerance and performance optimization.

skills.name: MQTT
skills.glossary: Implemented secure MQTT telemetry transmission and communication protocols for Oben Electric's connected vehicle systems.
skills.description: Lightweight publish/subscribe messaging protocol optimized for resource-constrained telemetry devices in EV systems.

skills.name: BullMQ
skills.glossary: Implemented BullMQ at Oben Electric to queue asynchronous background jobs, retry failed API requests, and rate-limit internal tasks.
skills.description: Redis-backed message queue for handling asynchronous jobs, rate-limiting, delayed jobs, and background task processing in Node.js.

skills.name: Uber H3
skills.glossary: Utilized Uber H3 hexagonal spatial indexing at Oben Electric for mapping vehicle telemetry, geofencing, and proximity analytics.
skills.description: Hexagonal hierarchical spatial index. Used for geographic visualization, vehicle location mapping, and efficient telemetry queries.

skills.name: GitHub
skills.glossary: Used GitHub extensively for collaborative software development, open-source contributions, code reviews, version management, and maintaining production-grade backend systems across EV, Healthcare, and Logistics projects.
skills.description: Experienced with Git-based workflows including branching strategies, pull requests, code reviews, merge management, repository maintenance, issue tracking, release management, and CI/CD integrations. Contributed to open-source projects and maintained clean, collaborative development practices for scalable engineering teams.

skills.name: Docker / Podman
skills.glossary: Containerized backend services across development and production environments, creating reproducible deployments for microservices, analytics workloads, and internal platforms while simplifying development, testing, and CI/CD workflows.
skills.description: Experienced in building optimized multi-stage Dockerfiles, image optimization, container networking, volume management, Docker Compose, Podman, environment isolation, and containerizing Node.js, Go, and Python applications for scalable deployments.

skills.name: AWS Services
skills.glossary: Built and maintained production workloads on AWS, leveraging cloud services for scalable deployments, secure infrastructure, monitoring, autoscaling, and API endpoint protection across healthcare and EV platforms.
skills.description: Hands-on experience with EC2, IAM, VPC, Security Groups, S3, CloudWatch, Elastic Beanstalk, Route 53, API Gateway, Secrets Manager, Lambda, Auto Scaling, and CloudFront, with a focus on secure, reliable, and highly available backend infrastructure.

skills.name: Kubernetes
skills.glossary: Exposure to Kubernetes concepts and deployment workflows for containerized applications.
skills.description: Container orchestration, writing basic YAML configs for deployments, services, ingress, and configmaps.

skills.name: CI/CD Pipelines
skills.glossary: Worked with CI/CD workflows across production environments using GitHub Actions and Jenkins-based pipelines for automated builds, testing, validation, and deployment processes. Integrated development workflows with automated checks to improve release reliability and delivery speed.
skills.description: Understanding of continuous integration and deployment practices including automated testing, build automation, deployment triggers, environment-based releases, pipeline execution, and integration with tools like GitHub Actions and Jenkins. Experienced in consuming, maintaining, and improving existing pipelines while collaborating with DevOps team for production releases.

skills.name: Linux
skills.glossary: Used Linux environments for backend development, production debugging, server administration, scripting, and deployment workflows.
skills.description: Experience with shell scripting, process management, networking commands, logs, permissions, system monitoring, and troubleshooting production services.

skills.name: k6
skills.glossary: Integrated k6 into CI/CD pipelines at Visit Health to validate API performance thresholds before production deployments, preventing latency regressions.
skills.description: Developer-centric load testing tool. Writing JavaScript-based test scripts to simulate user traffic, measure RPS/latency, and identify bottlenecks in microservices.

skills.name: Prometheus & Grafana
skills.glossary: Built real-time monitoring dashboards for Oben Electric's EV fleet services, tracking API error rates, queue depths, and system resource utilization.
skills.description: Metrics collection and visualization stack. Configuring exporters, writing PromQL queries, and creating alerting rules for proactive incident response.

skills.name: Apache Airflow
skills.glossary: Orchestrated complex ETL pipelines at Oben Electric for aggregating vehicle telemetry data and generating daily business intelligence reports.
skills.description: Programmatic workflow orchestration platform. Designing DAGs for data ingestion, transformation, and scheduled reporting with dependency management and retry logic.

skills.name: Data Structures
skills.glossary: In-depth computer science grounding. Qualified GATE 2020. Strong application of graphs and spatial search trees in geospatial routing.
skills.description: Deep understanding of linear and non-linear structures, binary trees, heaps, graphs, hashing, and complexity analysis applied to real-world routing problems.

skills.name: Algorithms
skills.glossary: Robust foundation in algorithmic complexity. Applied to vehicle routing, route optimization, and data deduplication in ERP and IoT tracking platforms.
skills.description: Asymptotic analysis, divide & conquer, greedy methods, dynamic programming, graph traversal, and complexity classes (P vs NP) for optimization challenges.

skills.name: Operating Systems
skills.glossary: Strong understanding of memory allocation, process scheduling, and concurrency, applied when optimizing Node.js clustered servers and IoT device interactions.
skills.description: CPU scheduling, process synchronization, memory management (paging/virtual memory), file systems, and deadlocks in production environments.

skills.name: Databases (Theory)
skills.glossary: Deep understanding of relational algebra, B-trees, normalization, transaction isolation levels (ACID), and concurrency protocols.
skills.description: Relational model algebra, normalization theory (up to BCNF), transaction concurrency control, and crash recovery mechanisms.

skills.name: OOPs
skills.glossary: Design patterns, inheritance, and dependency injection implemented in TypeScript and Go microservices across Oben Electric, Visit Health, and Kabra.
skills.description: Core Object-Oriented Programming principles including inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation, abstraction, and object relationships for modular design.

skills.name: Computer Networks
skills.glossary: OSI model, TCP/IP protocols, and network security concepts applied when configuring secure local microservice environments.
skills.description: OSI stack layers, TCP/IP protocols, routing algorithms (OSPF, BGP), congestion control, and network security fundamentals.

skills.name: Computer Architecture
skills.glossary: Understanding of memory hierarchy and instruction sets, applied when optimizing server scripts and cache setups.
skills.description: Instruction pipelining, addressing modes, memory hierarchy, cache optimization, and I/O interface design.

skills.name: Compiler Design
skills.glossary: Academic foundation. Comprehension of parsing, AST creation, and lexical analysis, aiding in custom query parser construction.
skills.description: Lexical analysis, parsing techniques (LL/LR parser construction), syntax-directed translation, and intermediate code generation.

skills.name: Microprocessors
skills.glossary: Intel 8085 architecture knowledge, assembly programming, and interrupts, applied when interfacing with telemetry device firmware.
skills.description: 8085 architecture, instruction sets, memory/peripheral interfacing, assembly programming, and interrupts.

skills.name: Technical Mentorship
skills.glossary: Mentored junior developers at Oben Electric and Visit Health, conducting code reviews and pair programming sessions to elevate team velocity.
skills.description: Guiding junior engineers through complex architectural decisions, conducting thorough code reviews, and fostering a culture of continuous learning and technical excellence.

skills.name: Agile Leadership
skills.glossary: Led sprint planning and retrospectives for cross-functional teams at Oben Electric, ensuring alignment between business goals and technical delivery.
skills.description: Facilitating agile ceremonies, managing backlogs, breaking down epics into actionable tasks, and ensuring transparent communication across stakeholders.

skills.name: System Architecture Decisions
skills.glossary: Made critical technology choices for Oben Electric's EV platform, selecting QuestDB, Kafka, and Microservices to handle scale.
skills.description: Evaluating trade-offs between technologies, creating RFCs for major architectural changes, and taking ownership of long-term system health and scalability.

skills.name: Cross-Team Collaboration
skills.glossary: Collaborated with hardware, firmware, and product teams at Oben Electric to define telemetry APIs and vehicle data contracts.
skills.description: Bridging gaps between backend, frontend, hardware, and product teams to ensure seamless integration and aligned technical specifications.

skills.name: Code Quality Standards
skills.glossary: Established coding standards, linting rules, and testing protocols across multiple startups to reduce technical debt and improve maintainability.
skills.description: Defining and enforcing engineering best practices, setting up automated quality gates, and championing test-driven development (TDD) within the team.

skills.name: Application Security
skills.glossary: Designed secure backend services with authentication, authorization, input validation, and protection against common web application vulnerabilities.
skills.description: Applied secure coding practices following OWASP Top 10 guidelines, implemented JWT/OAuth authentication, RBAC, input sanitization, CSRF/XSS/SQL Injection prevention, secure session management, encryption, audit logging, and secure handling of payment and healthcare data.

skills.name: Cloud Security
skills.glossary: Implemented cloud security best practices across AWS infrastructure, protecting services, APIs, and sensitive workloads.
skills.description: Experienced with IAM policies and roles, Security Groups, VPC networking, Secrets Manager, KMS encryption, CloudWatch monitoring, least-privilege access, secure S3 configurations, endpoint protection, SSL/TLS, and production security hardening.

skills.name: API Security
skills.glossary: Built secure APIs with authentication, authorization, rate limiting, request validation, and abuse prevention for high-traffic production systems.
skills.description: Implemented JWT/OAuth authentication, API Gateway security, AWS endpoint security, IP whitelisting, rate limiting, throttling, CORS policies, request signing, payload validation, API versioning, and logging to protect public and internal services.

skills.name: IoT Security
skills.glossary: Secured communication between cloud infrastructure and resource-constrained EV IoT devices through protocol hardening and secure authentication.
skills.description: Implemented secure device authentication, encrypted communication, certificate-based trust, firmware communication hardening, replay attack prevention, secure key management, and optimized security mechanisms for low-power embedded devices.

skills.name: Vulnerability Assessment & Security Hardening
skills.glossary: Strong understanding of identifying, mitigating, and preventing application and infrastructure vulnerabilities across production systems.
skills.description: Knowledge of OWASP Top 10, SSRF, IDOR, SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF, RCE, XXE, insecure deserialization, broken authentication, privilege escalation, dependency vulnerabilities, security headers, penetration testing concepts, and infrastructure hardening with continuous monitoring and secure deployment practices.
